Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}{f 5 13 2 10 101}Hey, dude! Let's grab some seats up front![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_900_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Ahh! They're all over the third floor already! This is it... We're gonna die here![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_901_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Stay calm! We can't give up now! There's always hope, no matter how damned the world is![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_902_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}As god as my witness, I won't die in this mall![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Watching the humans fight for survival[n]in that movie made me a little braver.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Oh, man! My hands were sweating like crazy. Everything was so well done.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 4 22 0 101 33 25 20}But dude, three movies in a row is way too much. Anyway, it's getting dark, so let's bounce.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I parted ways with Tomochika[n]and went back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
